title: The Groups Run From Shinokuni
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The central beat is the groups run from shinokuni.
scene: The scene focuses on the groups run from shinokuni, with Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Punk Hazard Guards
dialogue.text: In front of Caesar's research facility

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Listen here!! You open up those shutters!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: The candy... give us candy ... quickly....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My head hurts so bad... Uerg hhhh...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Now hurry along to your room, children...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh? What's Wrong, Bra - Little Girl?!

summary: The Groups Run From Shinokuni. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
